fix: Replaced local variable assignment with .Clear() + foreach .Add() to mutate the existing outer-scope ArrayLists. Removed unnecessary null=.Count validation lines.
rootCause: Load button event handler assigned imported data to local-scope variables instead of updating the outer ArrayList, then called .Count on potentially-null results (PS 5.1 throws on null.Count). The local assignment also meant the UI refresh read stale data from the outer-scope ArrayLists.
error: System.Management.Automation.PropertyNotFoundException: The property 'Count' cannot be found on this object.
title: AVPN-Tracker CSV Load: .Count PropertyNotFoundException on null + scoping bug
